description_long: This is a weathered stone obelisk set atop a multi-tiered square base, situated on a patch of grass. The obelisk shaft is tall, slender, and cylindrical, showing signs of age and surface erosion, with a slightly mottled texture. The base consists of three distinct, progressively smaller stone platforms, each with rough, chipped edges and visible wear, giving the structure a sense of historical significance. The stone material is predominantly gray with patches of moss or lichen, especially near the base, suggesting long-term outdoor exposure. The surrounding area is a square of green grass, neatly trimmed and slightly raised around the stone foundation. There are no visible inscriptions or decorative carvings on the shaft or base, and the tip of the obelisk is not visible in these views.
description: A tall, weathered stone obelisk with a multi-tiered square base, set on a grassy patch. The structure is gray and aged, with rough surfaces and no visible ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the square base and the central shaft rising from it, with grass surrounding the stone.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the layered structure of the base and the shaft, with some surface irregularities visible on the stone.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, highlighting the symmetry of the base and the even distribution of grass around the structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the same tiered base and shaft, with the grass border clearly visible.
attribute_base_design: The base is composed of three square stone platforms, each tier slightly smaller than the one below, forming a stepped structure. The edges are rough and chipped, with visible weathering and some moss or lichen growth, giving it an aged appearance.
attribute_tip_design: The tip of the obelisk is not visible in these views; the shaft appears to continue upward without any distinct cap or decorative feature in the visible portion.
attribute_surrounding_features: A square patch of green grass surrounds the base, slightly raised and neatly trimmed, with no other notable features or objects present.
